sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72695" key="oi)supo/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰσυπ-όεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n72695.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">οἰσυπώδης</ref></xr>, only in acc. pl. neut. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἰσυποῦντα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg028.perseus-grc1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
